metadata.description: Real-estate focused Claude Skills by Signal Yield Advisory — Japanese licensed real estate appraiser's AI toolkit.

plugins.name: jucho-kun
plugins.description: Automates first-pass investigation for Japanese real-estate disclosure documents (35-Article disclosure under the Building Lots and Buildings Transaction Business Act). Generates checklists, crawls municipal sites, extracts PDF highlights, and outputs xlsx reports.

author.name: Koichi Matsuda (Licensed Real Estate Appraiser, Japan, 2002-)
